shared_properties: Core canvas stays 1920x1080 at 16:9 with the project palette copied in every file.
Animated environment accents keep vector edges crisp under the 2 px clean outline rule.
differences: This asset contains six pulsing pillar frames that sit behind the duelists during cast anticipation and combo moments.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Backline glow shape, window rhythm, and magical hall depth grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Dynamic magical lighting and cast anticipation timing grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with six 240x240 frames and drive playback by a repeating Timer component on a decorative world entity.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/arcane_light_pillar_sheet.png through AssetServer and create a TextureAtlasLayout resource during scene bootstrap.
runtime_notes: Render pillars at z=10 behind both character sheets.
Loop the atlas at 8 fps with a brightness pulse that peaks on frames 3 and 4.
Spawn three mirrored instances across the rear stage without scaling the source texture.

context.role: Animated rear-stage magical light pillars that intensify cast anticipation.
context.usage: Visible during the full duel loop with higher playback emphasis during spell wind-up moments.

deliverables.notes: Six horizontal frames for looping rear-stage light pillars.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 1440x240 px with six 240x240 frames laid left to right.
Peak glow frames use only #D4AF37, #00FFFF, #8E44AD, and #FFFACD for emitted light accents.
Each frame keeps the pillar base aligned to y=224 px for stable world placement.
